emergencyFund.title: Create an Emergency Fund
emergencyFund.content: Aim to save 3-6 months of expenses for unexpected events.

fiftyThirtyTwenty.title: The 50/30/20 Rule
fiftyThirtyTwenty.content: Try to allocate 50% of income to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings.

payYourselfFirst.title: Pay Yourself First
payYourselfFirst.content: Set aside savings as soon as you receive income, before spending on other things.

trackSpending.title: Track Your Spending
trackSpending.content: Regularly review your expenses to identify areas where you can cut back.

automateFinances.title: Automate Your Finances
automateFinances.content: Set up automatic transfers to savings accounts and automatic bill payments.

diversifyInvestments.title: Diversify Your Investments
diversifyInvestments.content: Don't put all your eggs in one basket. Spread investments across different asset classes.

reviewGoals.title: Review Financial Goals Regularly
reviewGoals.content: Adjust your financial plan as your life circumstances change.

minimizeDebt.title: Minimize Debt
minimizeDebt.content: Pay off high-interest debt first and avoid unnecessary borrowing.
